setup_name: Oversold Exhaustion Bounce (speculative — dead-cat probable, reversal unconfirmed)
trigger: Daily close above 4.505 (today's high) on above-average volume confirms follow-through; OR hold above 4.17 for 2+ sessions builds a micro-base
stop_basis: Hard close below 3.91 (yesterday's fresh 52w low) invalidates exhaustion thesis; new low = trend continuation
risk_reward: 2.9:1 (at midpoint entry 4.30: 0.40 risk / 1.17 reward to daily EMA52 5.07; poor at full close price 4.46: 1.1:1)
one_line: Dead-cat more likely than reversal: single-day 12.3% bounce off fresh 52w low in a liquidating REIT whose gaps are payout-driven; weekly RSI 20 + MACD histogram curling is the only credible bull signal — wait for close above 4.505 before sizing up, stop hard under 3.91, confirm base only on reclaim of 50d 5.15.
